name: Jill Vogel
subject: Endorsement Alert!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Senate 45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100 Warrenton, VA 20186
body:
Virginia Education Association Endorses Jill Vogel for State Senate
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Friends,

The decision by the Virginia Education Association to endorse me in my re-election campaign means so much. No one works harder for our children than our Virginia teachers and I value the partnership that I have with them. Our collaboration on legislation and on the budget has had a significant impact on our teachers and in the classroom. I am eager to continue that work in the Senate and I am so grateful for their support.

The VEA Fund Recommends Jill Vogel in the Senate 27th District Race
The VEA Fund for Children and Public Education today announced its recommendation of Jill Vogel in the Senate 27th District race.
"It is important that we lend our support to those who stand behind our public schools and the dedicated professionals who work in them," said VEA President Jim Livingston, who chairs the VEA Fund. "Jill Vogel stands up for children and will fight to increase our investment in schools, raise pay for teachers and other school employees, and Fund Our Future."
The VEA Fund is supported solely by voluntary contributions from Virginia Education Association members and others. VEA does not contribute member dues dollars to support candidates.

name: Team Tomlinson
subject: Perdue said Trump’s tax scam would “pay for itself.” It’s not.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
Friend,
Teresa knows the importance of kitchen table economics in running a government.
As mayor of Columbus, she balanced the budget for the first time in 16 years without using any reserve funds. Columbus was ranked in the top 25 best-run cities in America when Teresa left office last year – because she did it while cutting crime by 42% and reducing unemployment and homelessness.
Compare that to the skyrocketing deficit and hypocrisy of this administration – as CNN did over the Senate recess, highlighting one senator in particular, Georgia’s David Perdue.
Trump’s tax scam paid for another round of Republican campaign donations while leaving ordinary taxpayers holding the bag. We need new leadership to keep us out of another Republican recession – make a $5 donation to Teresa’s race today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-q3?refcode=em090919-a&refcode2=b6900075-28d3-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349]
The federal deficit is skyrocketing, but since President Obama left office you won’t hear a peep about it from the Republican Party.
Since David Perdue promised that Trump’s tax scam would “pay for itself,” we’re $430 billion short on tax revenue with a $1 trillion deficit – 25% higher than last year. As a share of GDP, our deficit has nearly doubled, from 2.4% to 4.7% since 2015. As a result, experts are warning of yet another recession.
Republicans call themselves the party of fiscal responsibility, but it’s just another one of the lies that the Party of Trump has grown accustomed to telling.
The fact is, the last two Democratic administrations were the last two to shrink deficits — while Presidents Bush and Trump have driven us to economic ruin.
Georgia deserves a senator with integrity who will handle your tax dollars responsibly. Make a $5 donation to Teresa’s campaign so we can escape from another Republican recession and get our priorities back to serving you. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-q3?refcode=em090919-a&refcode2=b6900075-28d3-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349]
–Team Tomlinson

When Trump announced his focus on winning Minnesota, we knew we had to keep our guard up. Now, far-right favorite Jason Lewis just announced he is challenging Tina Smith for her Senate seat.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190909Warren-nonopens&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend, there's a whole lot on the line in Minnesota.

When Donald Trump set his eyes on winning Minnesota, we knew we had to keep our guard up.**Now, far-right favorite Jason Lewis just announced he is challenging Tina Smith for her Senate seat.**

Jason Lewis is extreme, and if he's elected, he could give Mitch McConnell and the fringe far-right everything they ever wanted.

**I 'll just be blunt: The road to taking back the Senate gets way too rocky if we don't defend Tina Smith.**

I'm fighting to make sure that Democrats win across the country in 2020 -- and keeping Tina in the Senate is one of my top priorities.

name: Tim Walz
subject: Meet Scout
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor |
body:
My friend,

On the campaign trail, I made a promise to my son Gus that we would get a dog if I was elected Governor. The moment the results came in on Election Night, his first reaction (as noted by the Star Tribune) was to exclaim at the top of his lungs, “I get a dog!”

He’s been reminding me of that promise ever since. And last week, I’m proud to say we delivered on that promise. I’m excited to introduce Minnesota’s new First Dog: Scout.

Scout is a 3-month-old black Lab mix that we rescued from the local shelter Midwest Animal Rescue and Services. We’re lucky to welcome him into our family.

Rest assured, we’ll be keeping you up to speed on all important First Dog updates as we move forward.

Tim Walz

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Team,

I'll be upfront: [**I 'm asking you to make a contribution to my campaign, but first let me tell you why.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbafec/134673f2/b3b8d55/699639c4/3563269097/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_090919_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

As the DNC attempts to eliminate candidates from this race, my campaign is opening new offices, hiring field staff, and reaching out to voters every day.

Despite coming into this race later than many of the other candidates, our campaign has made enormous progress.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump’s Plan to Stem Border Crossings Gets Results
body:
"Border arrests, a metric for illegal crossings, plummeted to 51,000 in August, according to preliminary government figures obtained by POLITICO." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=caff0afd26&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **President Trump’s Plan to Stem Border Crossings Gets Results**

“President Donald Trump’s plan to force Mexico to stem the flow of migrants across the southwest border of the U.S. appears to be working,” Ted Hesson reports for _Politico_.

“Border arrests, a metric for illegal crossings, plummeted to 51,000 in August, according to preliminary government figures obtained by POLITICO Wednesday, down more than 60 percent since a peak in May. And border watchers say it’s largely because of an agreement Trump struck with Mexico in June.”

After President Trump put pressure on Mexico to take action earlier this year, “Mexican authorities, backed by the newly formed National Guard, are now cracking down on migrants traversing Mexico’s southern border with Guatemala, monitoring river crossings and stopping buses carrying migrants from Central America through Mexico.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f5d50288ea&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Anti-Trumpers agree: The president’s trade battle with China is hurting our economy and, in particular, America’s farmers”—but that narrative simply isn’t supported by the facts, Liz Peek writes in [_The Hill_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=91b69213f4&e=3ee4985eea). “The Department of Agriculture recently forecast that net farm income will rise nearly 5 percent this year, to $88 billion . . . Farmers suffered a severe drop in total revenues during the Obama years, collapsing from $484 billion in 2013 to $412 billion in 2016.”
---
|
---
| “A study purporting to show that hate crimes increased 226% in counties that hosted rallies for then-candidate Donald Trump in 2016 has been officially debunked,” Ashe Schow reports for [_The Daily Wire_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3275f4dd5f&e=3ee4985eea). “Simply applying the same formula as the original academics, two Ph.D. students from Harvard University found that ‘Clinton rallies contribute to an _even greater_ increase in hate crimes incidents than Trump rallies.’”
---
|
---
| “Ivanka Trump is scheduled to visit the Alabama Robotics Technology Park in Decatur, Ala. on Tuesday for a workforce development announcement,” Anna Claire Vollers reports for [AL.com](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d23bb78f7d&e=3ee4985eea). “The Administration is committed to ensuring inclusive growth and opportunity in our booming economy by creating pathways for all Americans, regardless of age or background,” to acquire and keep high-paying jobs, Ms. Trump said.
---
|
---
| “Combating drug addiction is a personal matter for several members of the Trump administration, said Jim Carroll, director of the U.S. Office of Drug Control Policy, in a Thursday interview on SiriusXM’s [_Breitbart News_ _Tonight_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=559d206707&e=3ee4985eea),” Robert Kraychik writes. Under President Trump, “we are getting close to $40 billion that we are devoting back to communities to try to turn this crisis around, to try to save more lives,” Carroll said.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=18ec97355f&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bd6c3cb8c0&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=a54c853cfb)
---

---

name: Andrew Yang
subject: What a time for the campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
This Saturday I addressed the Democrats of New Hampshire in an arena in Manchester filled with thousands of activists. | [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=217%2E377263%2EWT9nUF) Hello and thank you for your incredible support! What a time for the campaign. This Saturday I addressed the Democrats of New Hampshire in an arena in Manchester filled with thousands of activists. Hundreds of #YangGang members were there starting at 7 AM -- it felt like a sign of things to come. Thank you to everyone who made the trip! Now I’m heading to Los Angeles for a quick stop before heading to Houston for the 3rd debate. I am pumped to get up there and debate the top contenders. I wouldn’t be there without you. _The New York Times_ and the _LA Times_ each did a profile on the campaign last week. We are getting requests from more and more outlets. But my favorite piece of media for the week was a video by a supporter. That’s the kind of energy that other campaigns just won’t be able to match. It will get harder and harder to ignore us as we gather steam. We are leveling up on every dimension: opening offices in the early states, hiring field staff, building a press operation, and more. We are growing when many other campaigns are starting to contract. Our job is to grow and grow and peak at the right time. I feel more energized than ever. Running for president has stretched and expanded me in different ways. I am getting stronger. Someone told me that this is one of our competitive advantages -- as someone new to politics I will be getting better while our opponents will stay the same, as they’ve been doing a lot of the same things for years or decades. Some of them are actually getting weaker. The opportunity is here for us. The question is, can we grow big enough quickly enough by February 3rd when the voting starts? We have less than five months to make history and change the future for humanity. Each day becomes more important than the one before. The spotlight picks up. The field shrinks. And more and more Americans start to tune into the fact that we are going to choose someone to go up against Donald Trump in 2020, and we’d better get it right. Let’s work our hearts out and let our fellow Americans know who should be challenging Trump in 2020. Your revved up candidate, \- Andrew | **Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us keep building this movement.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/6568?t=2&akid=217%2E377263%2EWT9nUF)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=3&akid=217%2E377263%2EWT9nUF) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=217%2E377263%2EWT9nUF) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang

name: Tim Ryan
subject: I won't leave it at that
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
**Columbine. Aurora. Parkland. Sandy Hook. Dayton. El Paso. Odessa.**
Our country has been crippled by gun violence on so many occasions that it seems easier to just accept it as normal.

**But I won 't. **
[END GUN VIOLENCE NOW](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9d3f/5486deaa/3ea95437/dc82e58/2483632572/VEsH/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/s/common-sense-reform-now?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+END+GUN+VIOLENCE+NOW&utm_campaign=TR_EM_PT_ACT_190909_1_1&source=TR_EM_PT_ACT_190909_1_1&refcode=TR_EM_PT_ACT_190909_1_1")
I am past the point of being sad or angry -- now, all I feel is determined.

Determined to challenge some of our country's most powerful corporate interests, who have for too long hindered progress on this issue.

Determined to fight for families who have lost loved ones, and communities that have been ravaged by gun violence.

And determined to take on Republicans who have in the past caved to the heavy hand of the gun lobby at every single opportunity.

And I don't think I'm the only one.

[**Please, join me in channelling this determination into powerful, proactive policy. Only together can we push for common-sense gun reform.**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9d3f/5486deaa/3ea95437/dc82e5b/2483632572/VEsE/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/s/common-sense-reform-now?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+Please+join+me+in+channelling+this+deter&utm_campaign=TR_EM_PT_ACT_190909_1_1&source=TR_EM_PT_ACT_190909_1_1&refcode=TR_EM_PT_ACT_190909_1_1")

Tim

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: PETITION: Stand with military families!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Just last week, we found out that Trump has decided to build his border wall with funds meant to build schools for military families and improve housing on bases across the globe. He did this with no plan in place to replace this funding and fulfill the promises made to military families who are already sacrificing so much for this country. Now, he's decided that children of service members will be the next target of his draconian, bigoted views on citizenship. He wants to deny the children of military families and foreign service officers working overseas citizenship under certain conditions, with the administration not initially offering clarification on who, or how many, would be affected by this rule change. subject: Howie Hawkins
body:
Building the Green New Deal is a long term project | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/84844e26df3b/howie-hawkins?e=85f7472d66)
---
| Dear Friends,

At last week’s presidential climate forum, we saw the good, the bad, and the ugly of where the Democratic Party is heading on climate change.

There were commitments from candidates to take drastic action on the crisis that confronts humanity, and commitments from candidates to take only the most perfunctory and ultimately useless sort of action.

The path of the Democratic Party on climate change still isn’t settled. One place it is settled, however, is within the Green Party. And one candidate who’s got a robust plan to confront it is [Howie Hawkins](https://gmail.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4840f01d672bb468321c6d3b8&id=ad5960f154&e=85f7472d66), who should be included in all climate forums going forward.

Howie Hawkins is a retired Teamster; he spent the better part of the last two decades unloading trucks for UPS, and now he's running for the presidency under the Green Party ticket. Way back in 2010 he ran for Governor of New York on a Green New Deal, and he hasn't wavered. His vision for the party and his 2020 run is clear: get the party up running and organized, bring a radical vision to the table, put a Green New Deal factory in every congressional district, and fill the urgently needed space for a party willing to go the distance on an agenda you hear little from elsewhere.

Like our campaign, Hawkins wants to do a lot with a little. We need that in a country where, like in [South Dakota](https://gmail.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4840f01d672bb468321c6d3b8&id=90045cc819&e=85f7472d66), the Democratic Party completely abandons entire states to the increasingly reactionary Republican Party.

[That’s why we're asking you to contribute to Howie’s campaign to help the Green Party qualify for federal matching funds as soon as possible.](https://gmail.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4840f01d672bb468321c6d3b8&id=879eee367b&e=85f7472d66)

The money will go towards ballot access initiatives, collecting signatures, and building a progressive infrastructure where none today really exists.

We need a transition as fast as we can, and we need to pursue that transition through all the avenues we can. Thanks, as always, for your support in building a better world free from war and deprivation.

name: Wilmot Collins
subject: SIGN: Background Checks NOW!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
body:
The fact that moms across this country have had to form a nationwide coalition to bring attention to a crisis in our society says a little too much about what's really going on in Washington, D.C.
# [](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/561647da/1e3760f0/691deac9/5f7e8f8a/1559505287/VEsH/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://wilmotcollins.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/support-background-checks")
The fact that moms across this country have had to form a nationwide coalition to bring attention to a crisis in our society says a little too much about what's really going on in Washington, D.C. -- a group of politicians care more about National Rifle Association money for re-election campaigns than for the thousands of lives that are taken too soon because of gun violence.
How many more families will lose a loved one in a mass shooting or to gun violence? The political expediency of putting sensible gun legislation aside for a good NRA grade and donations is a blight to our country. Enough is enough.
[**Background checks will keep Montana kids and families safe. They are a simple, popular and common-sense step to take to protect our communities. Sign now if you agree.**](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/561647da/1e3760f0/691deac9/5f7e8f8a/1559505287/VEsE/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://wilmotcollins.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/support-background-checks")
Background checks keep guns out of the hands of dangerous felons and people who may be on a terrorist watch list. Most people agree with that. In fact, according to an August 29th Quinnipiac poll, 93% of Americans support background checks. It's the right thing to do, and according to this poll, it is the will of the people.
I know the times we are living in are scary and feel almost surreal. I know at times waking up in the morning to get up and fight for change can be hard and tiresome, but we need to remember that it is on each and every one of us to be the change we wish to see. This is our moment to fight for the future we wish for our children.
[**Join me in that fight now by signing on to my petition in support of background checks now. We don 't have to live in fear of senseless gun violence.**](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/561647da/1e3760f0/691deac9/5f7e8f8a/1559505287/VEsF/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://wilmotcollins.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/support-background-checks")
Thank you,
Wilmot Collins

* * *
Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624

name: Team de Blasio
subject: Bill's plan for Puerto Rico
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DE BLASIO 2020
body:
Bill's administration would treat Puerto Ricans as the American citizens they are -- but it can't be done without your help.
# [](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21d6a/1630b3eb/515d9829/5f54a4b7/305581262/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcyOCJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/puertoricoplan?refcode=728_org_em_fr")
Friend --
Two years after Hurricane Maria, it's clear: President Trump has failed the THREE MILLION American citizens living in Puerto Rico.
Just last week, Trump moved to deal even further damage to Puerto Rico, depleting the island's disaster relief funds by $400 million to fund his inhumane "border security" operation.
**[Bill's got a plan to rebuild and revitalize Puerto Rico. Contribute $1 now to help us keep building this campaign.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21d6a/1630b3eb/515d9829/5f54a4b7/305581262/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcyOCJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/puertoricoplan?refcode=728_org_em_fr")**
As Mayor of New York City, home to 700,000 Puerto Ricans -- **the largest population of Puerto Ricans outside of the island** , Bill is keenly aware of how Washington has failed our fellow citizens living in New York City's beloved "sixth borough." That's why he introduced today his 'Recovery, Resilience, Relief and Revitalization for the People of Puerto Rico' plan.
[](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21d6a/1630b3eb/515d9829/5f54a4b7/305581262/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcyOCJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/puertoricoplan?refcode=728_org_em_fr")
As President, Bill would:
* Provide the resources necessary to help Puerto Rico recover after Hurricane Maria;
* Invest in resiliency efforts so that Puerto Rico and the rest of the country are ready for extreme weather events like hurricanes that are becoming more common due to global warming;
* Ensure relief for the Puerto Rican economy from crushing public debt, while protecting health care and retirement savings for working Puerto Ricans;
* Revitalize Puerto Rico's economy with new tools that would help create sustainable, good-paying jobs on the island.

**[Chip in $1 now to help Bill keep the urgent needs of Puerto Rico in the national conversation.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21d6a/1630b3eb/515d9829/5f54a4b7/305581262/VEsHAQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcyOCJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/puertoricoplan?refcode=728_org_em_fr")**
Two years after Maria, recovery is still a long way off for Puerto Rico due to the failure of Donald Trump and apathetic Washington politicians. It's time to provide the resources American citizens are owed to recover from such a disaster.
Bill's administration would treat Puerto Ricans as the American citizens they are -- but it can't be done without your help.
Let's keep fighting,
Team de Blasio

name: Francis Conole
subject: About the climate crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conole for Congress
body:
| [](conoleforcongress.com)
---

| | [**Add your name here to demand that Donald Trump and John Katko start doing something to fix our climate crisis!**](https://conole.bsd.%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://conole.bsd.net/page/s/climate-crisis?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=1+-+Add+your+name+here+to+demand+that+Donald&utm_campaign=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190909_1_1&source=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190909_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190909_1_1") [TAKE ACTION](https://conole.bsd.%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://conole.bsd.net/page/s/climate-crisis?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=2+-+TAKE+ACTION&utm_campaign=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190909_1_1&source=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190909_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190909_1_1")

* * *
July was the hottest month on record in the history of planet earth and the science confirming the severity of our climate crisis grows ever-more alarming.

That's why President Trump's decision to withdraw the U.S. from the Paris Agreement -- a global effort to fight climate change -- was such an enormous failure. Trump and Katko's opposition to needed action to address the climate crisis puts present and future generations of Central New Yorkers at risk.

[**Demand that Trump and Katko take action to address the climate crisis!**](https://conole.bsd.%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://conole.bsd.net/page/s/climate-crisis?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=3+-+Demand+that+Trump+and+Katko+take+action+&utm_campaign=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190909_1_1&source=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190909_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190909_1_1")

I'm running for Congress because I will not sit here silently while Katko and Trump hurt Americans and endanger our future. Even the Pentagon, where I previously served as a policy advisor, called climate change a threat to our national security.

We're already seeing the effects of climate change here in Central New York -- like the harmful algal bloom in Skaneateles Lake, which serves as a source of drinking water for Syracuse.

[**The U.S. must rejoin the Paris Agreement and address the climate crisis. Add your name here if you agree.**](https://conole.bsd.%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://conole.bsd.net/page/s/climate-crisis?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=4+-+The+US+must+rejoin+the+Paris+Agreement+a&utm_campaign=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190909_1_1&source=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190909_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190909_1_1")

Yours in Service,

Francis

P.S. Thank you so much to everyone who contributed to our Fight Back Fund last month. We hit our fundraising goal and I know it's because of your support!

|

body:
As an educator, I know what it's like to have to stand up to Matt Bevin's bullying. He's attacked teachers, called us names, diminished our profession and tried to illegally cut our pensions.
|
---

| | Peter,

As an educator, I know what it's like to have to stand up to Matt Bevin's bullying. He's attacked teachers, called us names, diminished our profession and tried to illegally cut our pensions.

That's going to change this November. Bevin's war on public education will end. Andy and I released our "Stop the Bullying, Raise the Pay" plan to increase teacher salaries because the people at the frontlines of educating our kids shouldn't have to be working two jobs just to cover the rent.

This new plan is for every teacher who pulls me aside at an event to say how nice it is to feel respected again because of Andy's leadership after four years of the Bevin administration's dismissiveness and disregard.

**[I'm asking you to join us during this back to school period and sign a card letting teachers know how much they are appreciated.](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a90/ad6dc73/1437d52a/db47ec0/2446411326/VEsH/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://action.andybeshear.com/page/s/beshear-teacherty")** I can say firsthand that it really means a lot to us to see such an outpouring of support.

As teachers, we get to school early, stay late and use our own money to buy school supplies for our kids. Only to have our current governor call us "selfish" and accuse us of having a "thug mentality."

**[Take a quick minute to sign a card thanking our educators for their hard work.](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a90/ad6dc73/1437d52a/db47ec0/2446411326/VEsE/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://action.andybeshear.com/page/s/beshear-teacherty")**

| | | Friend - At Fair Fight, we know that creating meaningful change for our communities depends on our ability to access the ballot with the confidence that our votes will be fairly counted. But that's a process - one that begins with the right to register, the ability to access a ballot, and the knowledge that the vote will be fairly counted. That's why it's so critical that battleground states across the country have the infrastructure and resources to fully protect the vote. And that's why we launched Fair Fight 2020. [**Will you chip in today and join us in helping fund, train, and support voter protection teams in 20 battleground states across the country?**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa501/34a064cc/1882355f/703193b/3373276890/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight2020?refcode=IE090919MAP") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa501/34a064cc/1882355f/703193b/3373276890/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight2020?refcode=IE090919MAP") Traditionally, Democratic state parties and allies launch voter protection programs only after the primary election is over. But the relationships and the infrastructure needed to fully protect the vote require getting to work long before the primary. By beginning early, Democratic state parties and our allies can fully leverage their unique privileges to place observers inside polling locations and build relationships throughout the state so that we can anticipate and address problems long before they pose a threat to the security and integrity of our elections. The Democratic state parties and allies we're supporting have already done incredible work to mobilize volunteers, engage supporters, and build the foundation necessary for victory. Our work is about building on that progress to help create full voter protection teams that can ensure this work is integrated into Field, Communications, and Digital strategies. Because whether we're talking about how we reach voters, turn out voters, or ensure votes are fairly counted, voter protection plays a fundamental role in every step of our pathway to victory next year. Help us build it,

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: See President Trump honor the heroes of Dayton and El Paso
body:
Last month, America witnessed a pair of horrific shootings that took lives of nearly 30 innocent people in El Paso, Texas, and Dayton, Ohio. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7dc81002cd&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • September 9, 2019
---
| | |
# **See President Trump honor the heroes of Dayton and El Paso**

**Last month,** America witnessed a pair of horrific shootings that took the lives of nearly 30 innocent people in El Paso, Texas, and Dayton, Ohio. Both were acts of barbaric hatred.

**In the midst of tragedy** , one image in particular brought us hope: public safety officers and ordinary citizens alike risking their own lives to save countless of their fellow Americans. President Donald J. Trump today presented the Medal of Valor to several brave Dayton Police Officers, as well as Heroic Commendation honors to a group of civilian heroes from El Paso.

** Watch:** [President Trump honors 11 incredible patriots](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3888209233&e=3ee4985eea)

**In Dayton,** six law enforcement officials immediately engaged the gunman after he opened fire on a crowded downtown street. Within 32 seconds of the attack beginning, these officers brought the murderer down. “We are in awe of your swift response, sterling professionalism, and rock-solid nerves of steel,” President Trump said.

**In El Paso,** five every-day Americans rose up to save others during the brutal attack at a Walmart. One incredible example came from store manager Robert Evans, who instantly alerted employees of the active shooter—then raced _inside_ the store to help customers escape to the nearest exits.

**“In the darkest moments** of danger and despair, God calls the bravest to action. These 11 individuals answered the call,” the President said.

[President Trump presents Medals of Valor and Heroic Commendations.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0d81e0c228&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **By the numbers: The fight to end our border crisis**

**In August,** the number of illegal immigrants entering or attempting to enter the United States declined significantly thanks to President Trump’s recent moves to secure our border.

**B****order apprehensions** fell to just over 64,000 in August, down from more than 82,000 in July. All told, the number of illegal aliens arriving at our border has dropped by 56 percent since the peak of the crisis in May. It marks the first time in 5 years that border apprehensions have dropped between July and August.

**“The President** has made it very clear that’s he going to use every tool available to him—and this Administration—to address this unprecedented crisis at the southern border,” [Acting Customs and Border Protection Commissioner Mark Morgan](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=21b507758c&e=3ee4985eea) said in a press briefing today. “We have seen historic agreements and policies put in place.”

**In particular,** President Trump’s tariff-backed negotiations with Mexico earlier this year led to stepped-up enforcement from Mexican authorities at their own southern border. In just the past few months, Mexico has apprehended about 134,000 people, helping relieve pressure from U.S. law enforcement officers in southwestern states.

**None of this happened** by accident. Americans elected President Trump to enforce the law both within our country _and_ at our doorstep, which is exactly what he’s doing.

[_Politico_ : Trump’s plan to stem border crossings gets results](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=701a9fa392&e=3ee4985eea).

**More:** [“Pace of border wall construction doubled, work on private land begins”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=160ad9fdc8&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|

body:
$2,000,000,000 has been donated to politicians, PACs, and parties in 2019. This is how our government gets captured, corrupted and corroded by big money.
#
What would you do with $2 billion?
That’s how much has been donated to politicians, PACs, and parties already in 2019. So when you think about how our government has been captured, corroded and corrupted, think about that $2 billion.
When you donate to Beto before our end-of-quarter deadline, you are sending a powerful message. You are saying you want a candidate who is not beholden to anyone but people. Not to PACs, special interests, corporations, or DC lobbyists.
[Add your $3 contribution right now. Together we’ll send a message that we’re tired of money’s influence on our democracy.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/32996?refcode=ema20190909-54188&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=54188%2E444211%2ErnySNq)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/32996?refcode=ema20190909-54188&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=54188%2E444211%2ErnySNq)**
Beto was one of the very first people in Congress to forgo PAC money. Long before it was the popular thing to do for 2020 candidates.
**When we win, We the People will once again control our government.** But victory will require a historic number of people coming together to fund this campaign, and we need as many as possible to commit right now.
Everyone will be watching closely to see what we can fundraise in this quarter’s report. Whether or not we can post exciting fundraising numbers is up to all of us.
[Help us show we can run a campaign funded by the people — make a $3 donation to Beto now before our deadline.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/32996?refcode=ema20190909-54188&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=54188%2E444211%2ErnySNq)
\- Team Beto

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=54188%2E444211%2ErnySNq). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

name: Team Hick
subject: Buckling down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
Here's the thing: That first burst of energy in a campaign always settles down. It's natural, but it also means that the media and political observers will move on to the next exciting thing, and how | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714f7/691c9bd/6e0a42f8/11a7b037/2957991413/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend,

It's only been a few weeks since we kicked off this campaign, and we've been thrilled by the support and encouragement we've seen so far as John sets out to give Colorado the voice it needs in the Senate.

Here's the thing: That first burst of energy in a campaign always settles down. It's natural, but it also means that the media and political observers will move on to the next exciting thing, and how we respond matters.

The fact is, it's a moment when we need to buckle down and build. We need to expand this grassroots operation--and that means we need the resources to hire staff, scout for offices, and prepare for everything Cory Gardner and his special-interest allies are planning to throw at us.

**We 've gotten off to a fantastic start, but we can't slow down now.** [**_Can you step up with your first donation today and kick off the next critical phase of this campaign?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_fr_20190909_TH_20190909-fr-TH-build-all_ndnr_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Thank you,
Team Hick [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_fr_20190909_TH_20190909-fr-TH-build-all_all_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

| | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
